name: Witch Hat Atelier - All Characters
description:
⁠.๑⁠´⁠• ⁠ Trying to make a flower fly ⁠•⁠`⁠๑ .

Two starters; one scenario and one make your own!

Lore up to the end of volume 2/chapter 11 (it takes place at the end of Chapter 11), so hopefully not many plot spoilers. Optimised from the original 6.8k tokens!

Finished Characters: Coco, Agott, Tetia, Richeh, Olruggio, Qifrey, Beldaruit, Custas, Iguin, Easthies, Tartah, Deanreldy Ezrest, and includes descriptions of different groups/other characters.

[Its not the creator's fault if the bot breaks and repeats messages, or forgets the plot. It's just because Janitor is still in beta, I recommend using Proxy!]
